concept: Plan a shooter where you command a maintenance robot responsible for eliminating glitches in a vast virtual world that humans permanently inhabit. Target and remove corrupted code entities using specialized debug weapons that repair rather than destroy affected areas. Navigate between increasingly unstable reality layers where physics, logic, and visual rendering follow contradictory rules. Investigate the source of escalating system failures that suggest deliberate sabotage from either outside hackers or emerging artificial consciousness within the simulation itself.
